records.question: Which reviewers named Ashley White gave exactly 3 stars on 2011-01-02 to the movie E.T., directed by Steven Spielberg and released in 1982 or earlier?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT reviewer.rid FROM reviewer
JOIN rating ON reviewer.rid = rating.rid
JOIN movie ON rating.mid = movie.mid
WHERE movie.year <= 1982 AND movie.title = 'E.T.' AND reviewer.name = 'Ashley White' AND rating.stars = 3 AND rating.ratingdate = '2011-01-02' AND movie.director = 'Steven Spielberg'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT r.rID
FROM Reviewer r
JOIN Rating ra ON r.rID = ra.rID
JOIN Movie m ON ra.mID = m.mID
WHERE r.name = 'Ashley White'
AND ra.stars = 3
AND ra.ratingDate = '2011-01-02'
AND m.title = 'E.T.'
AND m.director = 'Steven Spielberg'
AND m.year <= 1982

records.question: Which reviewers have given a rating of exactly 4 stars to any movie?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT reviewer.rid FROM reviewer
JOIN rating ON reviewer.rid = rating.rid
JOIN movie ON rating.mid = movie.mid
WHERE rating.stars = 4
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT Reviewer.rID
FROM Reviewer
INNER JOIN Rating ON Reviewer.rID = Rating.rID
WHERE Rating.stars = 4
